title: Are aliens just future humans?
summary: This short video clip explores the hypothesis that UFO/alien contact experiences may not involve beings from other planets, but rather humans from the future. It draws an analogy between how isolated tribes perceive outsiders as alien to how modern humans might misinterpret time travelers as extraterrestrials.

key_claims.claim: North Sentinel Island people have had minimal contact with the outside world except for encounters with anthropologists and Christian missionaries
Alien contact experiences might be interactions with beings from the future rather than from another planet
